sentences.target: Je cherche de la laine au magasin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ də la lɛn o maɡazɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je cherche de la laine au magasin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ də la lɛn o maɡazɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm looking for wool at the store.
translations.es: Estoy buscando lana en la tienda.
translations.it: Sto cercando della lana in negozio.
translations.pt: Estou à procura de lã na loja.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm len ở cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Ik zoek wol in de winkel.
translations.hi: मैं दुकान में ऊन ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter ull i butikken.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ull i affären.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter uld i butikken.
translations.ja: 店で毛糸を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; acts as the grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Preposition introducing a partitive construction with 'la' before a mass noun ('de la laine' = some wool).
Definite article, feminine singular; here combines with 'de' to form the partitive 'de la'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the partitive 'de la', denoting the searched material.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au', indicating the location.

sentences.target: Ce pull en laine est très doux.
sentences.reading: /sə pyl ɑ̃ lɛn ɛ tʁɛ du/

translations.fr: Ce pull en laine est très doux.
translations.ipa: /sə pyl ɑ̃ lɛn ɛ tʁɛ du/
translations.en: This wool sweater is very soft.
translations.es: Este suéter de lana es muy suave.
translations.it: Questo maglione di lana è molto morbido.
translations.pt: Esta camisola de lã é muito macia.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo len này rất mềm.
translations.nl: Deze wollen trui is erg zacht.
translations.hu: Ez a gyapjú pulóver nagyon puha.
translations.hi: यह ऊनी स्वेटर बहुत मुलायम है.
translations.pl: Ten wełniany sweter jest bardzo miękki.
translations.el: Αυτό το μάλλινο πουλόβερ είναι πολύ μαλακό.
translations.sv: Den här ulltröjan är väldigt mjuk.
translations.ro: Acest pulover de lână este foarte moale.
translations.cs: Tento vlněný svetr je velmi měkký.
translations.ja: このウールのセーターはとても柔らかいです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'pull' to specify a particular item.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase serving as sentence subject.
Preposition indicating material or composition; introduces 'laine' as a material complement.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'en', specifying the material of the sweater.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb of degree; intensifies the adjective 'doux'.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicative complement describing the subject.

sentences.target: On tricote de la laine avec ces aiguilles.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁikɔt də la lɛn avɛk se zeɡɥij/

translations.fr: On tricote de la laine avec ces aiguilles.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁikɔt də la lɛn avɛk se zeɡɥij/
translations.en: We knit wool with these needles.
translations.de: Wir stricken Wolle mit diesen Nadeln.
translations.it: Lavoriamo a maglia la lana con questi ferri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用这些针来织毛线。
translations.yue: 我哋用呢啲針嚟織毛線。
translations.ru: Мы вяжем этой пряжей этими спицами.
translations.he: אנחנו סורגים בצמר עם המחטים האלה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đan len bằng những cây kim này.
translations.nl: We breien wol met deze naalden.
translations.uk: Ми в’яжемо з вовни цими спицями.
translations.hi: हम इन सुइयों से ऊन बुनते हैं.
translations.pl: Robimy na drutach z wełny tymi drutami.
translations.el: Πλέκουμε μαλλί με αυτές τις βελόνες.
translations.nb: Vi strikker ull med disse pinnene.
translations.id: Kami merajut wol dengan jarum ini.
translations.sv: Vi stickar ull med de här stickorna.
translations.da: Vi strikker uld med disse pinde.
translations.ja: この針で毛糸を編みます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal personal pronoun; generic subject meaning 'one/people/we', takes 3rd person singular verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); denotes the action.
Preposition forming a partitive with 'la' before a mass noun ('de la laine' = some wool).
Definite article, feminine singular; with 'de' yields the partitive 'de la'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'tricote' with partitive reading.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies 'aiguilles'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu peux laver cette laine à la main.
sentences.reading: /ty pø lave sɛt lɛn a la mɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux laver cette laine à la main.
translations.ipa: /ty pø lave sɛt lɛn a la mɛ̃/
translations.en: You can wash this wool by hand.
translations.es: Puedes lavar esta lana a mano.
translations.de: Du kannst diese Wolle von Hand waschen.
translations.it: Puoi lavare questa lana a mano.
translations.ko: 이 울은 손으로 세탁할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以用手洗这团毛线。
translations.yue: 你可以用手洗呢團毛線。
translations.ru: Ты можешь стирать эту пряжу вручную.
translations.pt: Você pode lavar esta lã à mão.
translations.he: אתה יכול לכבס את הצמר הזה ביד.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể giặt len này bằng tay.
translations.nl: Je kunt deze wol met de hand wassen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш прати цю вовну вручну.
translations.hi: तुम इस ऊन को हाथ से धो सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να πλύνεις αυτό το μαλλί στο χέρι.
translations.nb: Du kan vaske denne ullen for hånd.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mencuci wol ini dengan tangan.
translations.sv: Du kan tvätta den här ullen för hand.
translations.ro: Poți spăla această lână de mână.
translations.da: Du kan vaske denne uld i hånden.
translations.ja: この毛糸は手洗いできます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; addresses the interlocutor.
Verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; modal meaning ability, selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux', expressing the action possible.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'laine' to specify a particular referent.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'laver'.
Preposition introducing the manner complement; part of the idiom 'à la main' (by hand).
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'main' within the prepositional phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' in the fixed expression 'à la main'.
